target.title: Run memory flush before preflight compaction
target.body:
Fixes #84695.

## Summary

- Run automatic memory flush before preflight compaction in `runReplyAgent`.
- Keep visible memory-flush errors on the same pre-run return path before the main reply.
- Add regression coverage proving memory flush is invoked before preflight compaction.

## What Problem This Solves

`runReplyAgent` must run the memory-flush phase before preflight compaction so durable memory has a chance to run before aggressive transcript reduction. Before this PR, preflight compaction could run first and reduce transcript context before the automatic memory flush path had a chance to preserve it.

## Evidence

- Real environment tested: isolated worktree `/private/tmp/openclaw-pr84792-proof-rebase-20260630`, rebased onto `origin/main` `d68ba5edc59`, PR head `8c816b184195db99570e124e649f39f8b0e8e237`, Node `v24.18.0`.
- Non-mocked direct-run proof: a temporary proof harness imported the real `runReplyAgent` plus real `agent-runner-memory` helpers. It did not mock `runMemoryFlushIfNeeded` or `runPreflightCompactionIfNeeded`.
- The harness supplied a `ReplyOperation` sentinel that stops only when `runReplyAgent` transitions to `running`, after both pre-run maintenance phases complete. That avoids an external provider call while still exercising the real direct pre-run path.
- Exact command:

```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/pr84792-real-direct-proof.test.ts
```

- Result:

```text
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  1 passed (1)
```

- Parsed diagnostics timeline:

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "head": "8c816b184195db99570e124e649f39f8b0e8e237",
  "timelinePath": "/private/tmp/openclaw-pr84792-proof-real-direct/timeline.jsonl",
  "phaseStartOrder": [
    "reply.memory_flush",
    "reply.preflight_compaction"
  ],
  "relevantEvents": [
    {
      "type": "span.start",
      "name": "reply.memory_flush",
      "timestamp": "2026-07-01T06:26:33.529Z",
      "phase": "agent-turn"
    },
    {
      "type": "span.end",
      "name": "reply.memory_flush",
      "timestamp": "2026-07-01T06:26:33.529Z",
      "phase": "agent-turn",
      "durationMs": 0.488
    },
    {
      "type": "span.start",
      "name": "reply.preflight_compaction",
      "timestamp": "2026-07-01T06:26:33.529Z",
      "phase": "agent-turn"
    },
    {
      "type": "span.end",
      "name": "reply.preflight_compaction",
      "timestamp": "2026-07-01T06:26:33.570Z",
      "phase": "agent-turn",
      "durationMs": 40.473
    }
  ]
}
```

Observed result after fix: the non-mocked direct `runReplyAgent` path starts `reply.memory_flush` before `reply.preflight_compaction`, then reaches the transition to the main `running` phase.

What was not tested: no external provider turn was executed; the proof stops after real pre-run maintenance to avoid unrelated provider/runtime behavior.

## Verification

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-direct-runtime-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-memory.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/reply-state.test.ts
Test Files  3 passed (3)
Tests  92 passed (92)

node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/pr84792-real-direct-proof.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  1 passed (1)

node node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-direct-runtime-config.test.ts
All matched files use the correct format.

pnpm check:test-types
# passed

pnpm lint
# passed

git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
# clean
```
target.author: turbotheturtle
